title: Inventory+
description: Tired of old minecraft inventory interface? You won't be able to play without this mod!
body:
🧊Inventory+

What if minecraft had a more fresh UI? I will be real, i just can't play Minecraft without this mod anymore! The inventory looks so beautiful and just bigger! 50 Slots! Just look at those: ![Survival inventory+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WatZiLQg/images/c317dde460a00112708705dcd466cd1c1fd9c820.png)

Creative Inventory
Smithing Table
Loom
**More at the gallery but just download the mod to see every new menu! (Each shulker box color has a colored UI!)**
Checkout inventory+ legacy https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory+-legacy
(Please report issues in github: https://github.com/dcqout/dcqinv/issues)
Please support my work at Ko-fi.com/dcqout if you want to see more from me.

Current changes:

Expanded/Remade the inventory ui!
